command: diff <(grep '^\s*"[a-z]' packages/app/src/i18n/zh.ts | sed 's/:.*//' | sort) <(grep '^\s*"[a-z]' packages/app/src/i18n/zht.ts | sed 's/:.*//' | sort) 2>/dev/null | head -30
reason: Find keys in zh that are not in zht and vice versa

import re
zh = set()
zht = set()
